description: Unicode/UTF-16 string edges: code-unit length vs code points, normalize(), surrogate handling.

tolerance.notes: String .length is UTF-16 code units; [...s].length counts code points. normalize('NFC') must collapse decomposed sequences identically. Lone surrogates round-trip as escapes; the host marshals strings as WTF-8/UTF-8 — a lone surrogate must be handled identically (replacement or preserved escape) across engines.
